rules.title: When an authorized caller who is an active user submits a request that is not a duplicate request, the handler MUST return a valid response and MUST write one request record.
rules.condition: an authorized caller who is an active user submits a request that is not a duplicate request
rules.raw: R1: When an authorized caller who is an active user submits a request that is not a duplicate request, the handler MUST return a valid response and MUST write one request record.

rules.title: When the request is a duplicate request, the handler MUST return a duplicate response and MUST NOT write a new request record.
rules.condition: the request is a duplicate request

obligations.text: MUST NOT write a new request record

rules.raw: R2: When the request is a duplicate request, the handler MUST return a duplicate response and MUST NOT write a new request record.

rules.title: When the caller is not an authorized caller, the handler MUST return HTTP 401 and MUST NOT write a request record.
rules.condition: the caller is not an authorized caller

obligations.text: MUST NOT write a request record

rules.raw: R3: When the caller is not an authorized caller, the handler MUST return HTTP 401 and MUST NOT write a request record.

rules.title: When the caller is an authorized caller but is not an active user, the handler MUST return HTTP 403 and MUST NOT write a request record.
rules.condition: the caller is an authorized caller but is not an active user

obligations.text: MUST NOT write a request record

rules.raw: R4: When the caller is an authorized caller but is not an active user, the handler MUST return HTTP 403 and MUST NOT write a request record.

notes: Story validates prompt intent, but no executable test references R1.
Story validates prompt intent, but no executable test references R2.
Story validates prompt intent, but no executable test references R3.
Story validates prompt intent, but no executable test references R4.
